MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR OCT-30-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE COMPANY
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO STRIKE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLEN, PAUL ALLEN, SHERYL
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-09-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - THE COURT OVERRULES THE DEMURRER TO THE BREACH OF CONTRACT AND BAD FAITH CAUSES OF ACTION. DEFENDANT'S MOVING PAPERS FOCUS ON THE UMBRELLA POLICY AND IGNORE PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGATIONS THAT HE IS ENTITLED TO GREATER BENEFITS UNDER THE PRIMARY/AUTOMOBILE POLICY. IT IS TRUE THAT INSURANCE CODE 11580.2(M) PROVIDES A COVERAGE FLOOR, BUT THE POLICY-WHICH IS NOT BEFORE THE COURT-MAY PROVIDE FOR GREATER COVERAGE. SEE CALFARM INS. CO. V. WOLF (2001) 86 CAL.APP.4TH 811, 817; UTAH PROP & CAS. INS GUAR. ASS'N V. UNITED SERVICES AUTO ASS'N (1991) 230 CAL.APP.3D 1010, 1020. THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE THAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FAILS AT THIS STAGE OF THE LITIGATION. THE COURT SUSTAINS THE DEMURRER TO THE NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION AND NEGLIGENCE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD MORE SPECIFIC ALLEGATIONS. SEE WALLMAN V. SUDDOCK (2011) 200 CAL. APP. 4TH 1288, 1308-1315. THE COURT OVERRULES THE DEMURRER TO THE NEGLIGENCE PER SE CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE DEFENDANT ONLY REFERENCES THE UMBRELLA POLICY IN THE DEMURRER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR SEP-09-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JAN-02-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, or in the alternative for summary adjudication is off calendar. A dismissal of the entire action was filed on July 3, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2012 Set For Trial On Sep-09-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KAREN VANDER MEER OF GILBERT, KELLY, CROWLEY & JENNETT LLP,
TEL. NO. 352-6410 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE COMPANY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OPPOSING PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied. The bad faith cause of action supports the claim for punitive damages. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/MJM

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KAREN VANDER MEER OF GILBERT, KELLY, CROWLEY & JENNETT LLP,
TEL. NO. 352-6410 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE COMPANY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OPPOSING PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - The Court overrules the demurrer to the breach of contract and bad faith causes of action. Defendant's moving papers focus on the umbrella policy and ignore plaintiff's allegations that he is entitled to greater benefits under the primary/automobile policy. It is true that Insurance Code 11580.2(m) provides a coverage floor, but the policy-which is not before the Court-may provide for greater coverage. See Calfarm Ins. Co. v. Wolf (2001) 86 Cal.App.4th 811, 817; Utah Prop & Cas. Ins Guar. Ass'n v. United Services Auto Ass'n (1991) 230 Cal.App.3d 1010, 1020. The Court cannot determine that plaintiff's claim fails at this stage of the litigation. The Court sustains the demurrer to the negligent misrepresentation and negligence causes of action for plaintiff to plead more specific allegations. See Wallman v. Suddock (2011) 200 Cal. App. 4th 1288, 1308-1315. The Court overrules the demurrer to the negligence per se cause of action because defendant only references the umbrella policy in the demurrer. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/MJM

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Continued To Nov-09-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to November 9, 2012 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 pursuant to the ex parte order entered on October 26, 2012. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Continued To Nov-09-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
